fields.name: id
fields.description: A unique 24-character hexadecimal identifier for the achievement. Follows a consistent format across all achievements.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The display name of the achievement (e.g., "Welcome to Tarkov", "The Kappa Path").

fields.name: description
fields.description: Text describing the conditions required to unlock the achievement (e.g., "Neutralize Killa 15 times while playing as a PMC").

fields.name: hidden
fields.description: Whether the achievement is hidden from players until unlocked (true) or visible from the start (false).

fields.name: playersCompletedPercent
fields.description: Raw percentage of all players who have completed this achievement (e.g., 0.06, 43.48).

fields.name: adjustedPlayersCompletedPercent
fields.description: Statistically adjusted percentage that accounts for active players, providing a more representative completion rate. Uses the percentage completion of Welcome to Tarkov as the baseline under the assumption that all active accounts have died once.

fields.name: side
fields.description: The game faction or player type this achievement is associated with. Values include "PMC", "All", or "Scavs".

fields.name: normalizedSide
fields.description: Lowercase, standardized version of the side field used for consistent sorting and filtering (e.g., "pmc", "all", "scavs").

fields.name: rarity
fields.description: The difficulty/rarity tier of the achievement. Values include "Common", "Rare", or "Legendary".

fields.name: normalizedRarity
fields.description: Lowercase, standardized version of the rarity field used for consistent sorting and filtering (e.g., "common", "rare", "legendary").

fields.name: imageLink
fields.description: URL to the achievement's image.

fields.name: crafts
fields.description: crafts is only available via the hideoutStations query.

fields.name: crafts
fields.description: crafts is only available via the hideoutStations query.

fields.name: historicalPrices
fields.description: historicalPrices is only available via the item and items queries.

fields.name: imageLink
fields.description: Only Handbook categories have image links

fields.name: minLevelForFlea
fields.description: Only Handbook categories have minLevelForFlea

fields.name: equipment
fields.description: equipment and items are estimates and may be inaccurate.

fields.name: barters
fields.description: barters and cashOffers are only available via the traders query.

fields.name: barters
fields.description: barters and cashOffers are only available via the traders query.

fields.name: types
fields.description: A list of all types supported by this server.

fields.name: queryType
fields.description: The type that query operations will be rooted at.

fields.name: mutationType
fields.description: If this server supports mutation, the type that mutation operations will be rooted at.

fields.name: subscriptionType
fields.description: If this server support subscription, the type that subscription operations will be rooted at.

fields.name: directives
fields.description: A list of all directives supported by this server.

fields.name: defaultValue
fields.description: A GraphQL-formatted string representing the default value for this input value.
